scripts.build:bins: bun run build:server-bin && bun run build:cli-bin
scripts.build:cli-bin: bun -e "import { mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true });" && bun run prisma:generate && bun build --compile --outfile dist/pupler-cli ./cli/cli.ts
scripts.build:server-bin: bun -e "import { mkdirSync } from 'node:fs'; mkdirSync('dist', { recursive: true });" && bun run prisma:generate && bun build --compile --outfile dist/pupler-server ./src/main.ts
